creator: chinsan.tw@gmail.com
text:

> Subject: Re: ports/100099: [PATCH] x11-clocks/buici-clock: update to 0.4.5

>

>

>
>  Thanks to chinsan,

Hi, Hendrik:

Ya, I forgot to reomve pkg-plist file after add PLIST_FILES setting
into Makefile.
Sorry, I am too tired.:p
You are so kind. :D

chinsan
